info.name: Ishraf Platform Backend API
info.description: Full Postman collection covering every live backend endpoint.

item.name: Health
item.description: Service health and readiness endpoints mounted outside /api/v1.

request.description:
Purpose: Return liveness information for the deployed service.

Roles: public

Auth: No bearer token required

Purpose: Return readiness information after checking database connectivity.

Roles: public

Auth: No bearer token required

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication, session lifecycle, password recovery, and current-user endpoints.

request.description:
Purpose: Change the current authenticated user password.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: ChangePasswordRequest

Purpose: Request a password reset token for an active account. Staging usually does not expose resetToken in the response.

Roles: public

Auth: No bearer token required

Body schema: ForgotPasswordRequest

Purpose: Authenticate with email or phone and issue access and refresh tokens.

Roles: public

Auth: No bearer token required

Body schema: LoginRequest

Purpose: Revoke the provided refresh token.

Roles: public

Auth: No bearer token required

Body schema: LogoutRequest

Purpose: Return the authenticated active user profile used for frontend bootstrap.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Exchange a valid refresh token for a fresh access/refresh pair.

Roles: public

Auth: No bearer token required

Body schema: RefreshTokenRequest

Purpose: Reset the password using a valid reset token. Successful reset revokes existing refresh tokens.

Roles: public

Auth: No bearer token required

Body schema: ResetPasswordRequest

item.name: Users
item.description: Admin-only user management endpoints for all roles.

request.description:
Purpose: List users with pagination and filters.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, role, isActive

Purpose: Create a new user for any supported role. profile is role-specific.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateUserRequest

Purpose: Return one user by id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update basic user fields and role-specific profile fields.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateUserRequest

Purpose: Activate or deactivate a user account.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateUserStatusRequest

item.name: Academic Structure
item.description: Admin-only academic years, semesters, grade levels, classes, subjects, and staff assignment endpoints.

request.description:
Purpose: List all academic years.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create an academic year record.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateAcademicYearRequest

Purpose: List semesters for the selected academic year.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a semester under the selected academic year.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateSemesterRequest

Purpose: Return one academic year by id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update an academic year.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateAcademicYearRequest

Purpose: Activate the selected academic year and deactivate any other active year.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: List classes with optional academic year, grade level, and activation filters.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: academicYearId, gradeLevelId, isActive

Purpose: Create a class section.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateClassRequest

Purpose: Return one class by id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update class operational fields such as section, capacity, and activation state without changing academic linkage.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateClassRequest

Note: [NEW] This is the canonical management surface for class corrections and activation updates.

Purpose: Return the active academic year and active semester used by operational admin surfaces.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: [NEW] This is the canonical global context for daily admin operations.

Note: If either the active academic year or active semester is missing, operational endpoints may return 409 Academic context not configured.

Purpose: Atomically set the active academic year and active semester for operational surfaces.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: ActiveAcademicContextRequest

Note: [NEW] Use this as the canonical activation flow instead of activating the academic year and semester separately.

Note: The selected semester must belong to the selected academic year.

Purpose: List grade levels.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a grade level.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateGradeLevelRequest

Purpose: Update semester dates or activation state.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateSemesterRequest

Purpose: List subject offerings with optional academic year, semester, grade level, subject, and activation filters.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: academicYearId, semesterId, gradeLevelId, subjectId, isActive

Note: [NEW] This is the canonical list surface for semester-aware subject availability.

Purpose: Link an existing subject to a semester without changing the subject master data.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateSubjectOfferingRequest

Note: [NEW] Subject offerings are the official semester-aware layer for subject availability.

Purpose: Return one subject offering by id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update a subject offering activation state. This round only supports isActive changes.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateSubjectOfferingRequest

Purpose: List subjects with optional grade level and activation filters.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: gradeLevelId, isActive

Purpose: Create a subject under a grade level. Subjects remain grade-level master data and do not accept semesterId.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateSubjectRequest

Note: Use subject-offerings to link a subject into one or more semesters without changing the subject master record.

Purpose: Return one subject by id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update subject master-data fields such as name, code, and activation state while keeping the subject grade-level-scoped.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateSubjectRequest

Note: [NEW] Subjects remain master data; semester-specific availability still belongs to subject-offerings.

Purpose: List supervisor assignments with optional academic year, class, and supervisor filters.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: academicYearId, classId, supervisorId

query.description: Filter by supervisor identifier. Accepts the supervisor user id from /users?role=supervisor or the legacy supervisor profile id.

request.description:
Purpose: Assign a supervisor to a class for an academic year. supervisorId accepts the supervisor user id from /users?role=supervisor or the legacy supervisor profile id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateSupervisorAssignmentRequest

Note: Frontend should send the supervisor user id returned by GET /users?role=supervisor. The backend resolves it internally to the stored supervisor profile id.

Note: Legacy integrations may still send the supervisor profile id directly.

Note: If the same value matches a supervisor user id and a different supervisor profile id, the backend rejects the request with SUPERVISOR_ID_AMBIGUOUS instead of guessing.

Purpose: Return one supervisor assignment by id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update a supervisor assignment for administrative corrections. supervisorId accepts the supervisor user id from /users?role=supervisor or the legacy supervisor profile id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateSupervisorAssignmentRequest

Note: [NEW] Supervisor assignment updates preserve the existing compatibility and supervisor-resolution rules.

Purpose: List teacher assignments with optional academic year, class, subject, and teacher filters.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: academicYearId, classId, subjectId, teacherId

query.description: Filter by teacher identifier. Accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

request.description:
Purpose: Assign a teacher to a class and subject for an academic year. teacherId accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateTeacherAssignmentRequest

Note: Frontend should send the teacher user id returned by GET /users?role=teacher. The backend resolves it internally to the stored teacher profile id.

Note: Legacy integrations may still send the teacher profile id directly.

Note: If the same value matches a teacher user id and a different teacher profile id, the backend rejects the request with TEACHER_ID_AMBIGUOUS instead of guessing.

Purpose: Return one teacher assignment by id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update a teacher assignment for administrative corrections. teacherId accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateTeacherAssignmentRequest

Note: [NEW] Teacher assignment updates preserve the existing compatibility and teacher-resolution rules.

item.name: Students
item.description: Admin-only student lifecycle, parent linking, and promotion endpoints.

request.description:
Purpose: List students for the active academic year with pagination and filters.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, classId, academicYearId, status, gender

Note: This operational surface is active-year-aware.

Note: If academicYearId is provided, it must match the active academic year or the request is rejected.

Purpose: Create a student in the selected class and create the matching academic enrollment record inside the same transaction.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateStudentRequest

Note: The selected class determines the academic year for the initial enrollment.

Purpose: Return one student by id using the active academic year as the current academic state.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: This operational detail surface requires an active academic context.

Purpose: Update student profile fields and lifecycle status.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateStudentRequest

item.name: [NEW] List Student Academic Enrollments By Student

request.description:
Purpose: Return all academic enrollments for one student across years.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create or upsert one academic enrollment for the selected student.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateStudentAcademicEnrollmentRequest

Note: [NEW] This is the canonical academic-management surface for assigning a student into a class for a specific year.

Purpose: Return parent links for one student.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Link an existing parent to a student. parentId may be either the parent user id returned by /users?role=parent or the underlying parent profile id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: LinkStudentParentRequest

Note: The backend resolves parentId to the stored parent profile id automatically. Prefer sending the user id returned by /users?role=parent in admin frontend flows.

Purpose: Promote a student to another class for a target academic year while writing structured enrollment state and promotion history.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: PromoteStudentRequest

Note: The promotion writes the target academic enrollment even when the target year is not active yet.

Note: students.class_id is only synchronized immediately when the target year is the active academic year.

Purpose: Mark one linked parent as the primary parent for that student. parentId may be either the parent user id returned by /users?role=parent or the underlying parent profile id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: The backend resolves parentId to the stored parent profile id automatically. Prefer sending the user id returned by /users?role=parent in admin frontend flows.

Purpose: List student academic enrollments for academic management and year preparation.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: studentId, academicYearId, classId

Note: [NEW] This is an academic-management surface, not a daily operational roster.

Purpose: Update one student academic enrollment record.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateStudentAcademicEnrollmentRequest

Purpose: Create or update many student academic enrollments for structured promotion and year preparation.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: BulkStudentAcademicEnrollmentsRequest

Note: [NEW] Use this for organized year-transition work instead of mutating students one by one.

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Session-based attendance endpoints used by admin, teachers, and supervisors.

request.description:
Purpose: Update one attendance record status or notes.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateAttendanceRecordRequest

Side effects: If the record changes into absent, the internal automation service may create notifications for linked parents.

Purpose: List attendance sessions for the active academic context with pagination. There is no root /attendance endpoint.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, classId, subjectId, teacherId, academicYearId, semesterId, sessionDate, dateFrom, dateTo

Note: Empty collections return 200 with items=[] and pagination metadata.

Note: This operational list is scoped to the active academic year and active semester.

Note: teacherId filter accepts the teacher user id returned by GET /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id. Prefer the user id in admin frontend flows.

query.description: Filter by teacher identifier. Accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

request.description:
Purpose: Create an attendance session inside the active academic context. Admin teacherId accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateAttendanceSessionRequest

Note: academicYearId and semesterId may be omitted; the backend resolves the active academic context automatically.

Note: If academicYearId or semesterId is sent, it must match the active context.

Note: The selected subjectId must have an active subject offering for the resolved semester.

Note: Admin frontend flows should send teacherId as the teacher user id returned by GET /users?role=teacher.

Purpose: Return one attendance session including its student roster.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Save the full attendance roster snapshot for one session.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: SaveAttendanceRecordsRequest

Side effects: Any newly absent record can trigger parent notifications through the internal automation service.

item.name: Assessments
item.description: Assessment types, assessments, and student score roster endpoints.

request.description:
Purpose: List assessments for the active academic context with pagination and filters.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, assessmentTypeId, classId, subjectId, teacherId, academicYearId, semesterId, assessmentDate, dateFrom, dateTo, isPublished

Note: This operational list is scoped to the active academic year and active semester.

Note: teacherId filter accepts the teacher user id returned by GET /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id. Prefer the user id in admin frontend flows.

query.description: Filter by teacher identifier. Accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

request.description:
Purpose: Create an assessment inside the active academic context. Teachers may omit teacherId and rely on the authenticated teacher profile. Admin teacherId accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateAssessmentRequest

Note: academicYearId and semesterId may be omitted; the backend resolves the active academic context automatically.

Note: If academicYearId or semesterId is sent, it must match the active context.

Note: The selected subjectId must have an active subject offering for the resolved semester.

Note: Admin frontend flows should send teacherId as the teacher user id returned by GET /users?role=teacher.

Purpose: Return one assessment detail record.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Return the score roster for one assessment.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create or update the full score roster for an assessment.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: SaveAssessmentScoresRequest

Purpose: Update one student score row.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateStudentAssessmentScoreRequest

Purpose: List assessment types.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a reusable assessment type.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateAssessmentTypeRequest

item.name: Behavior
item.description: Behavior categories, behavior records, and student behavior timelines.

request.description:
Purpose: List behavior categories used in behavior forms. There is no behaviorType query filter in v1.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a behavior category definition.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateBehaviorCategoryRequest

Purpose: List behavior records for the active academic context with pagination and filters.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, studentId, behaviorCategoryId, behaviorType, academicYearId, semesterId, teacherId, supervisorId, behaviorDate, dateFrom, dateTo

Note: This operational list is scoped to the active academic year and active semester.

Note: teacherId and supervisorId filters accept the corresponding user ids returned by GET /users or the legacy profile ids. Prefer user ids in admin frontend flows.

query.description: Filter by teacher identifier. Accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.
Filter by supervisor identifier. Accepts the supervisor user id from /users?role=supervisor or the legacy supervisor profile id.

request.description:
Purpose: Create a behavior record inside the active academic context. teacherId and supervisorId accept the matching user ids from /users or the legacy profile ids.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateBehaviorRecordRequest

Note: academicYearId and semesterId may be omitted; the backend resolves the active academic context automatically.

Note: If academicYearId or semesterId is sent, it must match the active context.

Note: Admin frontend flows should send teacherId or supervisorId as the selected account user id from GET /users?role=teacher|supervisor.

Note: Legacy integrations may still send teacher/supervisor profile ids directly.

Side effects: Negative behavior categories trigger parent notifications through the internal automation service.

Purpose: Return one behavior record.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Update a behavior record payload.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: UpdateBehaviorRecordRequest

Purpose: Return the student behavior timeline used beside behavior summaries. This endpoint is not paginated.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: If the student exists but has no behavior records yet, the response remains 200 with zero-safe summary values and records=[].

Derived data: The response combines behavior detail and summary SQL views such as vw_behavior_details and vw_student_behavior_summary.

item.name: Transport
item.description: Transport static data, assignments, trips, live locations, and trip student events.

request.description:
Purpose: Create an active student bus assignment.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateTransportAssignmentRequest

Purpose: Deactivate an active student bus assignment.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: DeactivateTransportAssignmentRequest

Purpose: List active student bus assignments.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: List buses used in transport setup.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a bus and optionally assign a driver. The request accepts the driver user id from /users?role=driver or the legacy driver profile id.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateBusRequest

Note: Frontend should send the driver user id returned by GET /users?role=driver. The backend resolves it internally to the stored driver profile id.

Note: Legacy integrations may still send the driver profile id directly.

Purpose: List recurring bus-to-route assignments for admin transport management.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a recurring bus-to-route assignment used by the driver daily workflow.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateTransportRouteAssignmentRequest

Purpose: Deactivate a recurring bus-to-route assignment. Legacy trips remain intact.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: DeactivateTransportRouteAssignmentRequest

Purpose: Return the active recurring route assignments owned by the authenticated driver.

Roles: driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: List transport routes.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a transport route.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateRouteRequest

Purpose: List route stops in stopOrder order.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create a stop under the selected route.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateRouteStopRequest

Purpose: Delete the current saved home location for one student.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Return the current saved home location reference for one student. In this round the endpoint is admin-only.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: If the student exists but no home location has been saved yet, the response remains 200 with homeLocation=null.

Purpose: Create or update the current student home location reference. v1 uses admin as the submitting source.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: SaveStudentHomeLocationRequest

Note: Admin may save pending, approved, or rejected locations. Only approved locations appear in the driver roster.

Purpose: List trips with pagination. Drivers only see trips within their scope.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, busId, routeId, tripType, tripStatus, tripDate, dateFrom, dateTo

Purpose: Create a trip for a bus and route. Drivers and admins can create trips.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateTripRequest

Purpose: Return one trip detail including latest location, route stops, and event summary.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Derived data: Trip detail aggregates transport views such as vw_trip_details, vw_route_stops, and vw_latest_trip_location.

Purpose: Mark a trip as ended.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: List student events recorded for a trip.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create one trip student event. stopId is required for boarded and dropped_off events, and must be omitted for absent.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateTripStudentEventRequest

Note: Trip student event validation is trip-date aware: the student must have a transport assignment covering the trip date and route.

Side effects: Dropped-off events trigger parent notifications through the internal automation service.

Purpose: Record one location point for a started trip.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: RecordTripLocationRequest

Purpose: Mark a scheduled trip as started.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Side effects: Trip start triggers parent notifications per assigned student through the internal automation service.

Purpose: Return the full student roster for one trip, including assigned stop coordinates, the latest event state inside the same trip, and approved home location when available.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: search, stopId

Note: The roster returns all students assigned to the trip route for the trip date, even when no trip event has been recorded yet.

Note: If the trip exists but has no eligible students, the response remains 200 with students=[].

Note: Only approved homeLocation data is exposed to the driver-facing roster.

Derived data: Roster rows are derived from trip-date transport assignments, route stop coordinates, approved student_transport_home_locations, and the latest trip_student_events row per student inside the same trip.

query.description: Filter roster rows by student full name or academic number.
Filter roster rows by assigned stop id.

request.description:
Purpose: Create or reuse the operational trip for one route assignment, trip date, and trip type without creating duplicates.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: EnsureDailyTripRequest

Note: If a matching trip already exists for the same bus, route, tripDate, and tripType, the response remains 200 with created=false.

Note: This is the preferred driver-facing daily trip flow. POST /transport/trips remains a legacy fallback.

Derived data: The endpoint reuses the natural uniqueness of bus + route + tripDate + tripType.

item.name: Communication
item.description: Direct messages, announcements, and notification center endpoints.

request.description:
Purpose: List all announcements, including expired ones, for admin management.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create an admin announcement targeted to all users, one role, or multiple roles. targetRole remains legacy; targetRoles[] is the new multi-role contract.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateAnnouncementRequest

Note: Announcements support roles/all only. Person-targeted announcements are not supported.

Note: Do not send targetRole and targetRoles together.

Note: If neither targetRole nor targetRoles is provided, the announcement targets all active roles.

Purpose: Return the active announcement feed visible to the authenticated role.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Derived data: The feed uses SQL views such as vw_active_announcements and filters by targetRoles[] when present; an empty targetRoles array means all roles.

Purpose: Send a direct message to another active user.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: SendMessageRequest

Purpose: Mark one received message as read.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create admin-only multi-target direct messages as individual one-to-one copies. The endpoint is all-or-nothing and uses the same audience rules as /communication/recipients.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: SendBulkMessageRequest

Note: [NEW] Direct multi-target delivery creates individual copies inside messages; it does not create a group thread.

Note: [NEW] At least one of receiverUserIds[] or targetRoles[] is required.

Note: [NEW] Explicit self-targeting is rejected.

Note: [NEW] If resolved audience is empty or explicit user ids are outside the available-recipient surface, the request fails with 400.

Derived data: Audience resolution reuses the same active-user and self-exclusion policy exposed by GET /communication/recipients.

Purpose: List a direct conversation thread with another user. The default sort is ascending by sentAt.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder

Purpose: List inbox messages for the authenticated user with unreadCount metadata.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, isRead

Purpose: List sent messages for the authenticated user.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, receiverUserId

Purpose: Create a manual notification for one user. notificationType is free-form and can coexist with automation-generated values.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateNotificationRequest

Purpose: Mark one notification as read.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Purpose: Create admin-only multi-target notifications in one all-or-nothing transaction with an authoritative delivery summary.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateBulkNotificationRequest

Note: [NEW] At least one of userIds[] or targetRoles[] is required.

Note: [NEW] Audience resolution reuses the same available-recipient rules as GET /communication/recipients.

Note: [NEW] The response returns delivery summary metadata rather than the full notification list.

Purpose: List notifications for the authenticated user with unreadCount metadata.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, isRead, notificationType

Derived data: Notification lists rely on views such as vw_notification_details and vw_user_notification_summary.

Purpose: Return the active users that the authenticated caller can currently message. v1 mirrors the current messaging policy: any active user except self.

Roles: admin, parent, teacher, supervisor, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, search, role

Note: The response is scope-limited to active users and excludes the authenticated user.

Note: Empty result sets return 200 with items=[].

query.description: Filter recipients by full name, email, or phone.

item.name: Homework
item.description: Homework management, submission rosters, and student homework surfaces.

request.description:
Purpose: List homework for the active academic context with pagination and academic filters.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Query params: page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, classId, subjectId, teacherId, academicYearId, semesterId, assignedDate, dueDate, dateFrom, dateTo

Note: This operational list is scoped to the active academic year and active semester.

Note: teacherId filter accepts the teacher user id returned by GET /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id. Prefer the user id in admin frontend flows.

Derived data: Homework lists are enriched by SQL views such as vw_homework_details.

query.description: Filter by teacher identifier. Accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

request.description:
Purpose: Create homework inside the active academic context. Teachers may omit teacherId and rely on the authenticated teacher profile. Admin teacherId accepts the teacher user id from /users?role=teacher or the legacy teacher profile id.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: CreateHomeworkRequest

Note: academicYearId and semesterId may be omitted; the backend resolves the active academic context automatically.

Note: If academicYearId or semesterId is sent, it must match the active context.

Note: The selected subjectId must have an active subject offering for the resolved semester.

Note: Admin frontend flows should send teacherId as the teacher user id returned by GET /users?role=teacher.

Purpose: Return one homework detail including roster-level submission summary.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Derived data: Homework detail is enriched through SQL views such as vw_homework_details and vw_homework_submission_details.

Purpose: Create or update the homework submission roster.

Roles: admin, teacher

Auth: Bearer access token required

Body schema: SaveHomeworkSubmissionsRequest

Purpose: Return homework assigned to one student. Parents are restricted to their linked children.

Roles: admin, teacher, parent

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: If the student exists but has no homework yet, the response remains 200 with items=[].

Derived data: Student homework uses view-backed projections such as vw_homework_details and vw_homework_submission_details.

item.name: Reporting
item.description: Role dashboards, student-scoped reports, transport summaries, and parent live-status endpoints.

request.description:
Purpose: Return the canonical parent dashboard surface for admin monitoring, starting from the selected parent user account.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Path identifiers are users.id values, not parent profile ids.

Note: This is the preferred backend surface for parent-first monitoring and role parity previews.

item.name: Get Admin Preview Parent Child Profile

request.description:
Purpose: Return the canonical child profile payload under one selected parent user for admin monitoring.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Requires the selected child to be linked to the selected parent or returns 404 Student not linked to parent.

Note: Path identifiers are users.id for the parent and students.id for the child.

item.name: Get Admin Preview Parent Child Assessment Summary

request.description:
Purpose: Return the canonical child assessment summary under one selected parent user for admin monitoring.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Requires parent-child linkage or returns 404 Student not linked to parent.

Note: Use assessmentSummary.subjects[] rather than items[].

item.name: Get Admin Preview Parent Child Attendance Summary

request.description:
Purpose: Return the canonical child attendance summary under one selected parent user for admin monitoring.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Requires parent-child linkage or returns 404 Student not linked to parent.

Note: No data yet returns 200 with zero-safe totals.

item.name: Get Admin Preview Parent Child Behavior Summary

request.description:
Purpose: Return the canonical child behavior summary under one selected parent user for admin monitoring.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Requires parent-child linkage or returns 404 Student not linked to parent.

Note: Use /behavior/students/:studentId/records for the detailed timeline outside this summary view.

item.name: Get Admin Preview Parent Child Transport Live Status

request.description:
Purpose: Return the canonical parent transport live-status surface for one linked child under a selected parent user.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Requires parent-child linkage or returns 404 Student not linked to parent.

Note: Wave 1 is polling-based and does not include Firebase or ETA.

Derived data: This response is view-backed and combines active assignment, active trip live status, latest location, and recent event projections.

Purpose: Return the canonical supervisor dashboard surface for admin monitoring, starting from the selected supervisor user account.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Path identifier is the supervisor users.id from /users?role=supervisor.

Note: Use this instead of reconstructing supervisor dashboard parity from multiple admin endpoints.

Purpose: Return the canonical teacher dashboard surface for admin monitoring, starting from the selected teacher user account.

Roles: admin

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: Admin-only, read-only preview surface.

Note: Path identifier is the teacher users.id from /users?role=teacher.

Note: Use this instead of reconstructing teacher dashboard parity from multiple admin endpoints.

Purpose: Return the full student profile payload used in admin and staff reporting screens.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: If the student exists but has no related attendance, assessment, or behavior rows yet, the response stays 200 with zero-safe summaries.

Derived data: This payload combines view-backed projections such as vw_student_profiles, vw_student_attendance_summary, vw_student_assessment_summary, and vw_student_behavior_summary.

Purpose: Return the student assessment summary. Use assessmentSummary.subjects[] rather than items[].

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: No data yet returns 200 with zero-safe overall metrics and an empty subjects array.

Purpose: Return the student attendance summary used in charts and cards.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: No data yet returns 200 with zero-safe totals, not 404.

Derived data: Derived from summary views such as vw_student_attendance_summary.

Purpose: Return the student behavior summary. Use /behavior/students/:studentId/records for the detailed timeline.

Roles: admin, teacher, supervisor

Auth: Bearer access token required

Note: No data yet returns 200 with zero-safe totals, not 404.

Derived data: Derived from summary views such as vw_student_behavior_summary.

item.name: Get Parent Child Transport Live Status

request.description:
Purpose: Return the transport live status for one linked child. Wave 1 is polling-based and does not include Firebase or ETA.

Roles: parent

Auth: Bearer access token required

Derived data: This response is view-backed and combines active assignment, active trip live status, latest location, and recent event projections.

Purpose: Return the transport summary surface shared by admin and driver.

Roles: admin, driver

Auth: Bearer access token required

Derived data: Transport summaries rely on views such as vw_trip_details, vw_latest_trip_location, vw_active_trip_live_status, and vw_trip_student_event_details.
